gist.headline: Green checkmarks ahead
gist.blurb: We've cleaned up some internal test suites and added VCR snapshots to make our testing pipeline more reliable.
gist.summary: Fixed several test failures in the enter.pollinations.ai gateway by updating model references and adding VCR snapshots for reliable test replays.
gist.impact: This improves our internal CI/CD pipeline reliability, helping us ship features faster and with fewer bugs.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee wearing a tiny hard hat, fixing a glowing green checkmark on a retro testing terminal. The Nomnom creature eating old red error logs.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny yellow hard hat, inspecting a retro computer terminal displaying glowing green checkmarks. The round tan nomnom creature sits nearby happily eating a stack of red error logs. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
